mapper.sql: id, rule_id, parent_condition_id, field_code, operator, compare_type, compare_field_code, compare_value, compare_unit, logic_type, is_group, group_logic_type, sort_order, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM auth_letter_rule_condition WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT FROM auth_letter_rule_condition WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_letter_rule_condition (rule_id, parent_condition_id, field_code, operator, compare_type, compare_field_code, compare_value, compare_unit, logic_type, is_group, group_logic_type, sort_order, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{parentConditionId}, #{fieldCode}, #{operator}, #{compareType}, #{compareFieldCode}, #{compareValue}, #{compareUnit}, #{logicType}, #{isGroup}, #{groupLogicType}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)

INSERT INTO auth_letter_rule_condition (rule_id, parent_condition_id, field_code, operator, compare_type, compare_field_code, compare_value, compare_unit, logic_type, is_group, group_logic_type, sort_order, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES
(#{item.ruleId}, #{item.parentConditionId}, #{item.fieldCode}, #{item.operator}, #{item.compareType}, #{item.compareFieldCode}, #{item.compareValue}, #{item.compareUnit}, #{item.logicType}, #{item.isGroup}, #{item.groupLogicType}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_letter_rule_condition SET field_code = #{fieldCode}, operator = #{operator}, compare_type = #{compareType}, compare_field_code = #{compareFieldCode}, compare_value = #{compareValue}, compare_unit = #{compareUnit}, logic_type = #{logicType}, is_group = #{isGroup}, group_logic_type = #{groupLogicType}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE auth_letter_rule_condition SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE auth_letter_rule_condition SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
